screenrecorder.error-cancelled: Recording was cancelled or permission was denied.
screenrecorder.error-gif-not-implemented: GIF export is not yet implemented.
screenrecorder.select-what-to-record: Select what you want to record
screenrecorder.recording-description: Choose a tab, window, or your entire screen to start recording with audio and webcam options.
screenrecorder.warning-mac-title: Recording computer audio on macOS requires additional setup
screenrecorder.warning-mac-desc: Due to system restrictions, internal audio recording may need third-party tools like BlackHole or Soundflower.
screenrecorder.warning-title: Recording system audio may not be fully supported
screenrecorder.warning-desc: Browser limitations prevent direct capture of computer audio on most platforms without additional software.
screenrecorder.click-to-choose: Click below to choose what to record (screen, window, or tab).
screenrecorder.press-esc: Press Esc or click below to stop
